from coverage by the statute 
(§1861(m)(5) of the Act, the services of a nurse that are required to administer the 
medications safely and effectively may be covered if they are reasonable and necessary to 
the treatment of the illness or injury. 

A. Injections 

Intravenous, intramuscular, or subcutaneous injections and infusions, and 
hypodermoclysis or intravenous feedings require the skills of a licensed nurse to be 
performed (or taught) safely and effectively. Where these services are
